name: BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows
notes: This Building Block triggers when an internal system communicates with a URL that is considered to be hosting Cryptocurrency Mining. It could be an indicator of a Cryptocurrency Mining malware infection.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows
BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Remote
when a flow matches any of the following BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows
when the flow matches HTTP Host is not N/A
when HTTP Host is categorized by X-Force as Cryptocurrency Mining
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: X-Force Premium: Internal Host Communication with Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote
AND NOT when a flow matches any of the following BB:Threats: Communication to Cryptocurrency Mining URL for Flows
AND when the flow matches HTTP Host is not N/A
AND when HTTP Host is categorized by X-Force as Cryptocurrency Mining
